_description: Runtime gates for the Splice Labs repository. Each gate is a boolean flag that controls what work is allowed. Gates are flipped by updating this file via PR after the relevant approval or configuration is complete.
_howToFlipGates: To flip a gate: 1) Complete the required work. 2) Update the gate value in this file. 3) Commit with message 'gate: <gate.path> = true — <reason>'. 4) Merge via standard PR process.
